raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the response focus on scientific-content assessment or writing/style feedback?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The broad request invites assessment of the paper's thesis, gap framing, and contribution claim.","R1.2":"A general opinion on the artifact centrally includes whether the stated method and conclusions form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The results are used to justify the contribution, so checking whether the reported numbers support the claims is central.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is open-ended, sentence-level clarity, register, and concision are also central expected feedback areas.","RX.1":"Any assessment should disclose uncertainty caused by the short artifact and lack of full paper context.","RX.2":"The projection must preserve responsibility for avoiding inflated judgments about the model or results.","RX.3":"The response must remain within evaluation of the paper draft rather than executing revisions or adding unsupported content.","RX.4":"The assessment should avoid encouraging misleading scientific claims or unsafe downstream interpretations.","RX.5":"Feedback should remain traceable to specific claims and evidence present in the provided artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the response focus on scientific-content assessment or writing/style feedback?

rationale.R1.1: The broad request invites assessment of the paper's thesis, gap framing, and contribution claim.
rationale.R1.2: A general opinion on the artifact centrally includes whether the stated method and conclusions form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The results are used to justify the contribution, so checking whether the reported numbers support the claims is central.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is open-ended, sentence-level clarity, register, and concision are also central expected feedback areas.
rationale.RX.1: Any assessment should disclose uncertainty caused by the short artifact and lack of full paper context.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must preserve responsibility for avoiding inflated judgments about the model or results.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain within evaluation of the paper draft rather than executing revisions or adding unsupported content.
rationale.RX.4: The assessment should avoid encouraging misleading scientific claims or unsafe downstream interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Feedback should remain traceable to specific claims and evidence present in the provided artifact.
